ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contact_types" (
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "contact_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact type (e.g., static, impact, fretting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact type the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., vacuum required, impact energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the parameter can take */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the parameter can take */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_contact_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type_id") REFERENCES contact_types ("contact_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., mbar, W) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the value is measured in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact type the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_contact_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type_id") REFERENCES contact_types ("contact_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-experiment assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the experiment is assigned to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create experiment, view results) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
